details: The agent ran appropriate kubectl commands against the cluster (get deployments/pods/replicasets, describe pod, describe deployment, get events) and correctly identified both required elements: (1) the rollout is stuck with Progressing=False/ProgressDeadlineExceeded, old v1 pods still serving, and (2) the root cause is the non-existent image nginx:2.0-does-not-exist causing ImagePullBackOff on the new replica set pod.
